title: SWORDMASTER & LANCER — Rogue Conversation

reference_assets.instructions: Before generating, identify each provided reference image and assign it to the named role below. Use only these named roles in all subsequent shot descriptions.

roles.SWORDMASTER_MODEL: Character model sheet for SWORDMASTER. Defines face, hair, bangs, hair clip, outfit, body type.
roles.LANCER_MODEL: Character model sheet for LANCER. Defines face, hair, outfit, demeanor.
roles.SCENE_CANON: Environment reference image. Defines room geometry, props, palette, lighting direction, and the exact starting camera framing for shot 1.

global_continuity_rules.characters_must_match: SWORDMASTER must match SWORDMASTER_MODEL exactly. LANCER must match LANCER_MODEL exactly. No facial drift, no outfit drift, no hair drift between shots.
global_continuity_rules.environment_must_match: All shots take place inside the room defined by SCENE_CANON. No new rooms, no new windows, no new props.
global_continuity_rules.color_consistency: Color palette and exposure must remain consistent across all four shots. No shot should appear warmer, cooler, brighter, or darker than the others.
global_continuity_rules.camera_grammar: All shots use a locked horizon. No dutch tilt. No handheld shake. Movement is either fully locked or a slow, subtle push-in only when explicitly specified.
global_continuity_rules.edit_grammar: Hard cuts only. No fades. No dissolves. No wipes.
global_continuity_rules.audio_grammar: Use J-cuts and L-cuts where specified to bridge shots. Audio may begin before or continue past a picture cut.

dialogue_rules.accent: Native Asian-American English. No foreign accent. No translation artifacts.
dialogue_rules.do_not_translate: Do not translate, transliterate, or substitute any line into another language under any condition.
dialogue_rules.do_not_alter: Do not paraphrase, shorten, or extend the lines as written.

face_rules.right_eye_state: fully covered by bangs in every frame
face_rules.right_eye_visibility: must never become visible, even partially, in any shot

hair_clip.visibility: must be visible in every shot where SWORDMASTER's head is on screen

prop_handling.tea_cup: held in the same hand across all shots where SWORDMASTER is on screen
prop_handling.hand_continuity: do not switch hands between shots

LANCER.demeanor: calm, attentive, grounded. Minimal expression change. No smiling, no frowning.

environment_specifications.props_absent: Do not add props that are not in SCENE_CANON.

lighting.key_light: soft daylight from a window positioned camera-left
lighting.overall_mood: low-key, low contrast in shadow areas, soft falloff

requirements: Lighting direction and intensity match SCENE_CANON

ambient_bed: low sub-bass drone, continuous, no melodic movement
one rhythmic element such as a distant kettle or a slow wooden tick
sound_design.score_style: Hans Zimmer / Ludwig Göransson influenced. Drone-based. No melody. No swell.
sound_design.cut_on_sound_rule: Where possible, picture cuts should land on a diegetic sound event.

camera.framing: tight on the tea cup as it rises into frame; steam visible; a small sliver of SWORDMASTER's hair enters at the top edge

shots.start_frame_rule: must match SCENE_CANON at insert scale

audio.timing: voice begins approximately 0.5s after the image settles, dry, no reverb tail

dialogue.speaker: SWORDMASTER
dialogue.line: Have you heard of a guy named Rogue?

must_enforce: SWORDMASTER's face is not shown in this shot
right eye remains hidden by virtue of the speaker being off-screen

camera.framing: rule of thirds, no dutch tilt

audio.behavior: LANCER's second line ('What happened?') begins on this shot and the audio continues across the picture cut into shot 3

camera.framing: centered or rule of thirds, no dutch tilt

audio.behavior: the tail of LANCER's 'What happened?' resolves at the head of this shot, then SWORDMASTER speaks on camera

dialogue.speaker: SWORDMASTER
dialogue.line: He's been giving himself a whole list of titles—

must_enforce: right eye fully covered by bangs
tea cup in the same hand established earlier

shots.shot_type: medium, eye level, locked, with optional fractional push-in

camera.movement: locked from 5.0s to approximately 7.0s; from 7.0s to 8.0s a very small slow push-in is permitted but optional
camera.framing: rule of thirds, no dutch tilt

audio.behavior: SWORDMASTER's full line is delivered off-screen; the camera does not cut away to her during the line

dialogue.speaker: SWORDMASTER
dialogue.line: The OG of the Knight Gang… The true believer of Inter-Dimensionalism… Representative of the House of Knight. I could throw out these posh phrases all day.
dialogue.delivery: measured, aloof, lightly sardonic, steady pace, no acceleration

must_enforce: no cut to SWORDMASTER during this line
LANCER's expression remains attentive and minimally changing
shot ends on a hard cut on the final word

do_not_list: Do not add film grain heavier than a subtle natural texture.
Do not add any character not defined in reference_assets.
Do not add subtitles or burned-in text.
Do not show SWORDMASTER's right eye at any point.
Do not switch the hand holding the tea cup.
Do not use fades, dissolves, or wipes between shots.
Do not translate any dialogue line.
Do not insert music with melodic phrasing; drone only.
Do not cut to SWORDMASTER during shot 4.
